caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a dark green long-sleeved shirt with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold, and large over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. In the background, a white wall features the text "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a repeating logo that includes the words "UNICORN HUSTLE" alongside yellow stars. To his right, a black container with a red and white label reading "THE TRACK OUT" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated posture, slightly turned to his left, speaking and gesturing subtly with his facial expressions while looking toward someone off-camera. The lighting and composition remain constant, with very little movement occurring between the frames.
